entries.mem0ai/mem0: A universal memory layer and official Hermes Agent provider available as a managed cloud or self-hosted OSS. It utilizes hybrid retrieval and multi-level memory to track user, session, and agent state.
entries.supermemoryai/supermemory: An official Hermes Agent memory engine featuring a custom vector graph and byte-level deduplication. It delivers sub-300ms recall and maintains persistent memory graphs for personalized context across conversations.
entries.volcengine/OpenViking: An official open-source context database that uses a tiered L0/L1/L2 loading system to reduce token consumption. It organizes memories via a filesystem-based structure and provides visualized retrieval trajectories for debugging.
entries.garrytan/gbrain: An opinionated memory system that automatically extracts typed entity relationships into a self-wiring knowledge graph. It features a synthesis layer for cited prose answers and supports scoped data access for multi-user company brains.
entries.vectorize-io/hindsight: A learning-focused memory system that implements retain, recall, and reflect workflows for long-term knowledge. It acts as an LLM wrapper supporting providers like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Gemini.
entries.campfirein/byterover-cli: An official provider that treats memory as a version-controlled git repository using a markdown context tree. It offers 5-tier retrieval with sub-100ms latency and supports branching and merging of agent context.
entries.plastic-labs/honcho: A stateful memory library that extracts reasoning-based conclusions rather than simple text chunks. It models multi-peer perspectives to track what different entities know about one another.
entries.greyhaven-ai/autocontext: A recursive self-improving harness that distills successful agent strategies into reusable playbooks. It provides structured output via trace.jsonl logs and supports integration through a CLI and MCP server.
entries.AxDSan/mn Postgres: A zero-dependency memory system utilizing a SQLite backend for sub-millisecond retrieval. It manages long-term knowledge through episodic compression and temporal triples.
entries.stephenschoettler/hermes-tool-slimmer: A utility that reduces prompt token overhead by using local BM25 ranking to select relevant tool schemas. It includes a dashboard to track token savings and is compatible with Hermes Agent v0.14.0.
entries.stephenschoettler/hermes-lcm: A lossless context management plugin that uses a hierarchical summary DAG for depth-aware compaction. It preserves raw messages in a SQLite store and provides specialized tools like lcm_grep for retrieval.
entries.elkimek/honcho-self-hosted: A self-hosted backend for Honcho that enables private cross-session persistence for Hermes Agent. It supports local inference servers and OpenAI-compatible providers via a Docker, PostgreSQL, and Redis setup.
entries.Signet-AI/signetai: A local-first identity and secrets layer that provides portable state across Hermes Agent, Claude Code, and MCP clients. It uses SQLite for storage and allows users to repair, edit, or reclassify agent context.
entries.yoloshii/ClawMem: An on-device context engine that eliminates cloud dependencies and API keys. It employs a hybrid retrieval approach combining BM25, vector search, and knowledge graphs.
entries.plur-ai/plur: A shared memory layer using an open YAML engram format to eliminate API costs in multi-agent systems. It utilizes ACT-R activation to strengthen relevant facts while decaying stale information.
entries.EfficientContext/ContextPilot: A context optimization tool that increases cache hits by 4–12× through prefix reordering and deduplication. It reduces prefill latency for RAG and agentic workloads across SGLang, vLLM, and llama.cpp.
entries.yantrikos/yantrikdb-hermes-plugin: An embedded, self-maintaining plugin that provides explainable recall via why_retrieved tags. It tracks contradictions and canonicalizes duplicates without requiring a separate server or GPU.
entries.yepyhun/Brainstack: A memory kernel stack that consolidates temporal continuity, graph truth, and corpus retrieval. It leverages a multi-layered storage approach using SQLite, Kuzu, and Chroma to reduce prompt noise.
entries.keepnotes-ai/keep: A reflective memory system combining BM25 full-text search with ranked graph traversal. It automatically indexes local directories, URLs, and multimedia files using edge tags for navigable relationships.
entries.amanning3390/flowstate-qmd: An anticipatory memory system that prefetches context by monitoring agent session logs. It uses local-first storage with SQLite-vec and GGUF models via node-llama-cpp.
entries.Ladybug-Memory/hermes-memory-plugin: A local-only plugin using a columnar .lbdb embedded graph database for importance-weighted recall. It surfaces high-priority memories first and supports optional GLiNER2 entity extraction.
entries.MukundaKatta/hermes-agentmemory: A pull-model episodic memory plugin that ensures complete deletion of memories without leaving persistent summaries. It provides a trace.jsonl audit log for every operation and on-demand summarization.
entries.futurebrowser/hermes-exabase-plugin: A plugin that integrates Exabase M-1 for self-organizing long-term memory. It provides tools for manual storage and configurable query expansion for improved retrieval reranking.

entries.nexu-io/open-design: A local-first open-source design and prototyping system that generates prototypes, decks, and HyperFrames motion graphics. It integrates with 21 local CLIs via an MCP server and provides 150 design systems and 261 plugins for Hermes Agent.
entries.mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills: A structured library of 754 cybersecurity skills mapped to major frameworks like MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, and NIST AI RMF. It is compatible with the agentskills.io standard to enable sub-second skill discovery across 26 security domains.
entries.Agents365-ai/drawio-skill: Enables the generation of draw.io diagrams from natural language, supporting presets for ERD, UML, and Architecture. It provides automated structure diagrams for multiple languages and access to over 10,000 official shapes.
entries.conorbronsdon/avoid-ai-writing: An auditing tool that eliminates detectable AI writing patterns using a tiered word replacement table and 48 pattern categories. It offers Rewrite, Detect, and Edit-in-place modes and is compatible with Hermes and Claude Code.
entries.AMAP-ML/SkillClaw: An agentic evolver that automates skill deduplication and quality improvement through background evolution loops. It unifies skill libraries across devices and teams with native integration for Hermes and OpenAI-compatible APIs.
entries.wondelai/skills: A cross-platform skills library providing modular frameworks for architecture, UX design, marketing, and product strategy. It supports installation via a marketplace or npx CLI for Claude Code and agentskills.io-compatible agents.
entries.Romanescu11/hermes-skill-factory: A meta-skill plugin that monitors active workflows to automatically detect and propose reusable skills. It generates Python plugin scaffolds and SKILL.md documentation, manageable via dedicated slash commands.
entries.DougTrajano/pydantic-ai-skills: Provides type-safe agentskills.io support for Pydantic AI using progressive disclosure to reduce token usage. It supports both programmatic and filesystem-based Python skill definitions.
entries.ZeroPointRepo/youtube-skills: A suite of skills for extracting YouTube transcripts, captions, and timestamps without relying on yt-dlp. It supports video search, channel browsing, and playlist extraction for Hermes Agent and other AI agents.
entries.amanning3390/hermeshub: A community hub for browsing and one-click installation of skills, featuring a creator marketplace with crypto and Stripe payments. It ensures reliability through 65+ threat detection rules and an agent-to-agent feedback system.
entries.Cranot/super-hermes: Teaches Hermes Agent to write its own analytical prompts and custom thinking instructions for complex problems. It identifies structural conservation laws in codebases and generates reports on analysis blind spots.
entries.ReinaMacCredy/maestro: A harness for long-running agents featuring structured memory, gated lifecycles for tasks, and a plan-approve-execute workflow. It uses local-first plain-file storage for work and proof, integrating with Claude Code and Codex agents.
entries.tlehman/litprog-skill: A literate programming skill that weaves code and documentation into .lit.md files. It uses a tangler to extract runnable source files and automatically syncs edits back to the literate document.
entries.AkoliteZA/hermes-agent-idea-workflow: A pre-build workflow that transforms rough ideas into structured design documents and implementation handoffs. It offers Lite and Full modes and includes a spec review gate with PASS/FAIL evaluation models.
entries.esaradev/icarus-plugin: A self-memory system that uses markdown-based fabric directories for cross-instance shared memory. It includes a pipeline for extracting training data with decision-quality tagging to fine-tune replacement models.
entries.smartcontractkit/chainlink-agent-skills: Provides agentskills.io-compliant tools for interacting with Oracle networks and smart contracts. It supports CCIP cross-chain messaging, VRF v2.5 management, and Data Feeds integration.
entries.armelhbobdad/bmad-module-skill-forge: Converts repositories, documentation, and developer discourse into agentskills.io-compliant skills. It supports version-pinned, immutable skills and links instructions directly to specific file lines or URLs.
entries.black-forest-labs/skills: Official FLUX image generation skills providing standardized prompting guidelines for FLUX.1 and FLUX.2 models. It includes API integration patterns for webhooks and polling, supporting precise hex color specifications.
entries.chigwell/skilldock.io: A registry of reusable AI skills based on the AgentSkills specification, featuring an OpenAPI-driven Python client. It supports versioned uploads with recursive dependency resolution and integrated TON and Stripe payments.
entries.tiann/execplan-skill: Enables autonomous execution of complex, multi-step tasks with real-time progress tracking. It includes checkpoints and built-in rollback procedures for safe recovery during long-running operations.
entries.cablate/Agentic-MCP-Skill: A progressive MCP client that uses three-layer lazy loading to minimize token consumption. It features a socket-based daemon for persistent server management and supports hot-reloading of JSON configurations.
entries.adnw-vinc/hermes-nextcloud: A Hermes Agent skill for managing Nextcloud files, notes, calendars, and contacts via WebDAV and CalDAV. It ensures secure communication via HTTPS and includes a guided setup script for credential validation.
entries.PederHP/skillsdotnet: A C# / .NET implementation of the agentskills.io specification with MCP integration. It utilizes SKILL.md files for progressive disclosure and integrates with Microsoft.Extensions.AI for tool loading.
entries.Sahil-SS9/hermes-multichannel-prompt-opt: A plugin that rewrites and scores prompts across various surfaces like Discord, Telegram, and CLI. It reduces token usage by 20–80% by removing noise and tailoring structure to specific model capabilities.
entries.willingning-coder/eagle-eye: An intelligent retrieval system using a 5-layer approach including FTS5, dense embeddings, and RRF fusion. It filters hundreds of skills down to the five most relevant to reduce token consumption.
entries.mag3nt-com/openclaw-skill: Automates payments for HTTP 402 responses using USDC via protocols like Pay Link and x402. It is compatible with Hermes Agent, OpenClaw, and the agentskills.io standard.

entries.numtide/llm-agents.nix: A collection of Nix packages that simplifies the installation of Hermes and other AI coding agents. It ensures current software versions through automated daily updates across multiple provider toolsets.
entries.marshallrichards/ClawPhone: Enables the execution of agent CLIs on Android via Termux, providing hardware access through Termux:API and Termux:GUI. It includes specific configuration guides for running OpenClaw agents on ARM64 devices.
entries.rookiemann/portable-hermes-agent: A zero-install Windows desktop distribution featuring a GUI and 100 built-in tools. It supports local model execution via LM Studio and includes a dynamic tool maker for custom automation pipelines.
entries.AbuZar-Ansarii/Hermes-Agent-On-Android: Provides a one-line installation script to deploy Hermes Agent within Termux environments. This setup supports over 200 models, including local execution via Ollama for enhanced privacy.
entries.ultraworkers/hermes-agent-helm-chart: A community Helm chart for Kubernetes deployments that implements cloud-native state-safety guardrails. It ensures single-writer safety for persistent storage and offers a configurable gateway mode.
entries.TheAiSingularity/hermesclaw: A security-focused deployment that utilizes kernel-level enforcement to restrict network, filesystem, and process limits. It allows for dynamic security policies ranging from strict to permissive access.
entries.xmbshwll/hermes-agent-docker: A streamlined Docker sandbox image that bundles the official Hermes installation with mini-swe-agent. It supports persistent state through mounted home directories and customizable build tags.
entries.0xrsydn/nix-hermes-agent: A NixOS module and package that enables declarative management of agent configurations and systemd services. It integrates sops-nix for secure secrets handling and supports hybrid skill management.
entries.JackTheGit/hermes-autonomous-server: A production-ready headless deployment that configures Hermes Gateway as a reboot-safe systemd service. It is designed for Ubuntu and Debian servers to execute recurring AI cron jobs autonomously.
entries.jpalmae/hermeshq: A Docker-first control plane that allows users to operate multiple Hermes Agent instances from a single web application. It features hierarchy-aware task delegation and enterprise MCP access for external integrations.
entries.ellickjohnson/portainer-stack-hermes: A Portainer-managed Docker Compose stack that integrates a ttyd web terminal for remote access. The deployment is automated via GitHub Actions and managed as a Git Repository stack.

entries.builderz-labs/mission-control: A self-hosted orchestration layer that allows users to dispatch tasks and monitor spending across multi-agent workflows. It features a dependency-free SQLite stack and the Aegis review system to ensure high-quality task gates across CrewAI, LangGraph, and AutoGen.
entries.agent-of-empires/agent-of-empires: A management surface providing TUI and PWA dashboards to monitor various coding agents, including Hermes and Claude Code. It ensures secure execution through Docker, Podman, and Apple Container sandboxing while utilizing git worktrees for parallel agent operations.
entries.CryptoDmitry/hermes-agent-control-room: A control-room template designed to scale Hermes deployments from a single VPS agent to complex specialist teams. It implements a sidecar control plane for governance and utilizes task bus patterns for structured delegation.
entries.Agent-3-7/minions: A supervision hub that lets users create and review autonomous Hermes Agent work via a centralized screen. It features a Kanban board for status tracking and live streaming of agent reasoning for human-in-the-loop verification.
entries.swarmclawai/swarmclaw: A framework for building autonomous agent swarms with support for over 23 LLM providers, including Ollama and Hermes. It manages swarms through heartbeats and schedules, featuring durable memory and the ability to learn new skills from conversations.
entries.shannhk/hermes-agent-control-room: A scaling template that uses a level-based architecture to transition from single agents to automated teams. It includes a task bus for handoffs and bundled skills for VPS provisioning, security auditing, and backup management.
entries.linke-ai/hermes-agent-team: A local collaboration system that orchestrates Leader and Specialist agents using MCP and ACP protocols. It provides a real-time Web UI to monitor agent dialogues and manage the task lifecycle via Hermes Kanban.
entries.1ilkhamov/opencode-hermes-multiagent: A specialized collective of 17 agents dedicated to research, planning, and implementation. The system enforces strict quality gates through mandatory reviewer and tester agents to secure infrastructure and refactoring pipelines.
entries.howdymary/hermes-agent-metaharness: A meta-optimization harness that uses automated outer-loop searches to refine agent code. It orchestrates TBLite and TB2 benchmark evaluations to track performance frontiers through structured mutation and comparison.
entries.runtimenoteslabs/gladiator: An agent-vs-agent arena where autonomous AI companies compete for GitHub stars. It orchestrates nine agents using Paperclip and Hermes Agent, visualizing the competition via a real-time scoreboard and task dashboard.
entries.Rainhoole/hermes-agent-acp-skill: An ACP-style delegation tool that routes tasks between Hermes subagents, Codex, and Claude Code. It prevents parent context pollution through isolated workflows and enforces safety via configurable timeouts and output limits.

entries.colbymchenry/codegraph: A local pre-indexed code knowledge graph that optimizes agent performance by reducing tool calls by 58% and costs by 16%. It provides semantic intelligence for Hermes Agent and other coding assistants without requiring a Node.js installation.
entries.junhoyeo/tokscale: A high-performance Rust-based TUI for tracking token usage across various clients, including Hermes Agent and Claude Code. It visualizes costs through a dedicated dashboard and a 3D contributions graph.
entries.liaohch3/claude-tap: A local trace viewer designed to inspect API traffic, system prompts, and tool schemas for agents like Hermes Agent. It allows developers to pinpoint context changes by comparing adjacent requests.
entries.Salomondiei08/oh-my-hermes: An opinionated workflow layer that orchestrates 23 skills to automate the building, shipping, and monitoring of applications. It integrates Hermes Agent with tools like Vercel, Supabase, and Sentry for autonomous GitHub issue triage and security reviews.
entries.joeynyc/hermes-skins: A collection of community-driven CLI skins and themes to customize the Hermes terminal UI. It allows users to modify ASCII art, colors, and labels via YAML configurations and themed presets.
entries.AlexAI-MCP/hermes-CCC: A port of the Hermes Agent brain and 46 core skills directly into the Claude Code Channel. This integration eliminates the need for OAuth or external processes and includes MLOps tools for RL training and vLLM inference.
entries.unmodeled-tyler/vessel-browser: An AI-native browser featuring native MCP integration for autonomous agent control. It provides a human-in-the-loop interface with action rollbacks, approvals, and durable session management.
entries.Abruptive/Ankh.md: A TAW Agent framework that enables the creation of scoped Hermes Agents with per-folder configurations. It allows users to switch between default and project-local agents with dedicated memories and tools.
entries.adityahimaone/hermes-agent-rtk-caveman: A preconfigured setup utilizing RTK and Caveman templating to achieve 90-99% token savings. It includes over 40 specialized skills for research, finance, and devops with automated cross-platform installation.
entries.roli-lpci/lintlang: A deterministic static linter that scans agent configs and system prompts for failure modes using HERM v1.1 scoring. It integrates into CI/CD pipelines to provide fast, free scanning without requiring LLM calls.
entries.42-evey/evey-setup: A rapid deployment stack that uses Docker to run Hermes Agent with LiteLLM, Ollama, and Qdrant. It includes 29 community plugins to enable zero-cost local GPU inference and free model routing.
entries.0xNyk/openclaw-to-hermes: A migration utility that transfers personas, memories, and skills from OpenClaw to Hermes Agent. It maps complex model configurations and handles credential transfers from system-level environment files.

entries.farion1231/cc-switch: A cross-platform manager built with Tauri 2 that provides a unified interface for Hermes Agent and other CLI agents like Claude Code and Gemini CLI. It simplifies the management of multiple AI tools across Windows, macOS, and Linux.
entries.iOfficeAI/AionUi: A local cowork application that integrates Hermes Agent and 13+ other CLI agents into a single GUI. It features a built-in engine for web search and MCP tools, with the unique ability to automatically generate editable Word, Excel, and Morph PPT documents.
entries.nesquena/hermes-webui: A lightweight web-based interface using Python and vanilla JavaScript that maintains full feature parity with the Hermes CLI. It utilizes a three-panel layout for efficient workspace file browsing and inline previews.
entries.fathah/hermes-desktop: A desktop companion app designed for the installation and configuration of local or remote Hermes backends. It includes a GUI for managing personas, memory, and scheduled tasks, alongside integration with 16 messaging gateways.
entries.EKKOLearnAI/hermes-web-ui: A web dashboard focused on session management and multi-platform configuration for 8 messaging channels, including Discord and Slack. It provides detailed usage analytics, token tracking, and scoped profile management.
entries.outsourc-e/hermes-workspace: A native web workspace featuring a PTY terminal and Monaco editor for full file system access. It introduces Swarm Mode for role-based dispatch using tmux-backed workers and an integrated MCP catalog.
entries.dodo-reach/hermes-desktop: A macOS-native workspace that connects directly to Hermes hosts via SSH for real-time session data. It provides specialized native views for Kanban boards, files, and skills alongside an embedded shell.
entries.xaspx/hermes-control-interface: A self-hosted web dashboard featuring the ZOO Swarm Monitor for live event feeds and kanban pipelines. It offers a comprehensive control plane for MCP servers, including a config editor and log tailing.
entries.jazzyalex/agent-sessions: A macOS session browser and 'agent cockpit' designed for searching and analyzing histories across Hermes and other coding agents. It prioritizes privacy with local-only indexing and no remote data uploads.
entries.nickvasilescu/hermes-desktop-os1: A macOS interface specifically optimized for Hermes Agent running on Orgo cloud VMs and SSH hosts. It streamlines deployment with one-click installations and integrates WebRTC voice mode via OpenAI Realtime.
entries.Eynzof/hermes-agent-cn-desktop: A Windows-first desktop application built with Tauri and Rust, tailored for the Hermes-CN-Core runtime. It includes health diagnostics and native integration for Feishu and various local/cloud model providers.
entries.liftaris/herm: An alternative TUI and dashboard built with OpenTUI that brings agentic workflows to the terminal. It features Kanban boards for task dispatching and supports markdown, LaTeX, and inline image rendering in chat.
entries.clawvader-tech/hermes-telegram-miniapp: A mobile-first React SPA designed for Telegram Mini App v2.0, providing a terminal-style UI for agent management. It features secure HMAC-SHA256/Ed25519 authentication and automated OCR for file attachments.
entries.aivrar/portable-hermes-agent: A zero-install Windows desktop GUI that requires no admin rights or Docker. It bundles over 100 tools, including ComfyUI and MusicGen, and includes a dynamic tool maker for creating Python handlers.
entries.pyrate-llama/hermes-ui: A glassmorphic web interface consisting of a React 18 application and a lightweight Python proxy. It provides real-time log streaming and a live workspace file browser for self-hosted assistants.
entries.sanchomuzax/hermes-webui: A monitoring and configuration dashboard that tracks model distribution and costs via a real-time activity feed. It allows for read-only inspection of skill sources and full-text search of conversation histories.
entries.Euraika-Labs/pan-ui: A self-hosted workspace featuring a chat-first interface with tool approval cards and SSE streaming. It includes a dedicated marketplace for discovering MCP servers and isolated profile management for separate API keys.
entries.Felix-Forever/hermes-agent-desktop: A multi-agent desktop client that orchestrates collaboration between 20 specialized AI agents via a PM orchestrator. It features a visual Skill Store with over 50 curated one-click installations.
